string-array.name: notification_template_big_media_narrow
string-array.item: A close-up of a pink flower with purple petals.
A close-up of a purple light, showing an abstract pattern.
Palm trees sitting on meringues with a light pink background.
A variety of flowers floating on water.
A close-up of neutral colored dandelions.
A close-up photo of a pink orchid flower with red accents.
A close-up of a yellow flower
A group of orange & rose gold sunglasses.
A close-up of a green leaf.
An aerial view of a beach with a body of water, featuring teal colored waves.
A group of mint green macarons.
A close-up of feathers in an icy blue color.
A close-up of a blue fabric, showing an abstract pattern.
A blue tiled surface with an abstract pattern.
A beach with blue water under a clear sky.
A close-up of a green plant. The focus is on the details of the leaves.
A green field with white lines, resembling a sports field or stadium.
A tree standing in water with clouds in the sky
A close-up view of a wave in the ocean
A close-up of a pink flower with detailed petals
A close-up of an orange fabric, showing an abstract pattern.
A close-up of a green plant. The focus is on the shape of the plant.
A shadow of a tree against a white wall.
A black and white image of sand dunes. Shadows accentuate the curves of the dunes.
A close-up of a beach, showing sand dunes and the ocean waves in black and white.
A close-up of a peach-colored drink with ice.
Bright yellow flowers in a field.
Desert with a hot air balloon.
White sand dunes and blue water.
Green rice terraces on a hillside.
City skyline with a snowy volcano.
Many animals grazing in a field.
Paris, France, with the Eiffel Tower.
Two birds flying in front of moon.
A single cloud above sand dunes.
Icy blue iceberg in the ocean.
Big Ben clock tower at night.
Red birds on a black background.
Black and white mountain and moon.
Yellow flowers on a dark branch.
White flowers on a black background.
Neon lines in a dark room.
Dark green leaves on a black background.
Swirly light trails in the dark.
Dark fish in a dark tank.
Night scene with mountains and moon.
